injuries: William Saliba (France) - back injury from semi-final loss, requires surgery, ruled out ~5 months
Aurelien Tchouameni (France) - muscle issue, missed last two matches, doubtful
Jordan Henderson (England) - freak arm injury, underwent surgery, out for rest of tournament
Reece James (England) - managing hamstring complaint, played through it vs Norway
suspensions: Jarell Quansah (England) - serving second match of a two-game ban (red card vs Mexico)
lineupHints: France - Maxence Lacroix expected to deputize for Saliba at centre-back over Ibrahima Konate
England - Thomas Tuchel expected to make significant changes to starting lineup
motivationFlags: World Cup third-place/bronze-medal playoff - reduced stakes after semi-final exits (France lost to Spain; England lost 2-1 to Argentina)
